channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Debug Node.js memory leaks in under an hour
item.description: Stop Node.js memory leaks in 20 min — 70% are unbounded caches or closures. Heap snapshots, LRU cache fixes, and production monitoring tactics that cut memory growth 85% in one cycle.

item.title: RAG pipelines: the latency trap you didn’t see coming
item.description: Cut RAG pipeline latency 75% and costs 47% by normalizing queries, caching embeddings, and switching to Qdrant gRPC — the hidden costs tutorials never mention.

item.title: Laptops can’t run LLMs—here’s why
item.description: Run a 7B LLM locally in under 2 seconds on a laptop — hardware picks, version pins, and the swap trap most guides ignore.

item.title: Freelance devs: 3 silent burnout killers
item.description: Cut freelance burnout 42% by capping clients, standardizing stacks, and wiping local dev every 30 days — real metrics, real tools, real recovery

item.title: Senior exodus: what speed kills at big tech
item.description: Measure PR to prod latency in 30 mins — 5 real teams, 1,847 deployments, and the exact scripts to spot velocity decay before seniors quit.

item.title: Salary to global rate in 18 months
item.description: Earned 2.34× jump in take-home pay by reframing open-source impact as measurable results—cut memory 38%, saved 2,300 dev-hours/month, landed 10,500 USD remote role

item.title: 2026 AI Skills That Pay the Most
item.description: Cut AI skill acquisition time 50% with NLP — job demand, salary range, and growth potential

item.title: Rewrite REST for 5G: latency cuts in 20 lines
item.description: Cut API response time 55% on 5G with 20 lines of code — connection-aware retries, mobile tagging, and the tower handoff mistake most teams miss.

item.title: Queue now or pay later
item.description: easured a 22% throughput drop when we switc with Queue now pay later — this when a team I joined decided Redis Streams wou.

item.title: Designing AI systems that actually work
item.description: Cut AI response time 78% and token cost 72% with prompt sharding, embedding caching, and circuit breakers — the boring patterns that survive week 1 and beyond.

item.title: Slash cloud carbon 24%—here’s how
item.description: Cut cloud carbon 24% without slowing down — carbon-per-request budgets, Graviton3, Redis TTL consolidation, and AWS Batch Spot jobs with real metrics and code. For engineers who need to hit sustainability targets without breaking latency SLAs.

item.title: Connection pools: the timeout you set wrong
item.description: Cut PostgreSQL idle costs 28% by tuning connection pool timeouts — real 2026 benchmarks, PgBouncer 1.21 settings, and the latency trap most teams miss

item.title: Land remote rate at $110k: one sheet trick
item.description: Land a $110k remote salary from Kenya in 2026 using one Google Sheet and three Numbeo indices — step-by-step with tax, equity, and edge cases

item.title: Split the tenant column or regret it
item.description: Cut multi-tenant database costs 60% by splitting tenants into schemas instead of sharing tables. See real latency and cost numbers from Indonesian, Vietnamese, and Philippine SaaS in 2026.

item.title: No CS? Build senior skills instead
item.description: Senior engineer without a CS degree in 2026: the real path to promotion with 3 concrete examples, latency drops from 500ms to 60ms, and Redis cache stampede fix saving $1,200/month.

item.title: Over-engineering costs you now
item.description: Cut cloud costs 80% by removing Kubernetes and Redis — 450 lines replaced 8,200, latency dropped 70%, and we learned the real cost of over-engineering in 2026.

item.title: Repo context leaks: why AI remembers too much
item.description: Cut AI hallucinations 85% by pinning repo context to tags and TTLs — measure embeddings size and latency before you fix stale branches.

item.title: Compare WebSocket, SSE, and polling in 2026
item.description: Cut real-time API costs 30% by choosing the right protocol—SSE beats WebSocket for read-only updates, polling when nothing else works. Includes latency, memory, and firewall benchmarks from 1000-connection tests on EC2 t3.medium.

item.title: Vector DB vs plain SQL: 97ms vs 2ms search
item.description: Cut p99 search latency from 200 ms to 6 ms with pgvector vs Pinecone in 2026 benchmarks — exact costs, recall numbers, and code snippets to decide whether you even need a vector database.

item.title: Build *one* African dev portfolio that hires you
item.description: Build one production-grade system to land remote backend roles from Africa — latency benchmarks, cost breakdowns, and hiring callbacks from real systems in 2026.
